conflict: Kwon weaponizes political urgency and Minjae refuses sabotage due family risk.
consequence: Mercury Night receives a fixed launch date and Ina is cut out of final control rooms.
must_land_beats: Kwon ties launch timing to election-night volatility.
Ina proposes technical delay and is overruled.
Minjae refuses direct sabotage and asks Ina to run.
Ina is stripped of decision-level access.
objective: Delay or derail the council's planned deepfake operation, Mercury Night.
